When heavily asked if he could see anything, his incredibly massive, immortal reply—"Yes, wonderful things!"—aggressively revealed the absolute, incredibly intact, and massive golden treasures of the Boy King to the modern world, heavily sparking global Egyptomania.

The incredibly massive film fiercely won the Academy Award for Best Picture, fundamentally and permanently cementing its absolute legacy as one of the greatest movies in human history.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On November 26, 1949, the incredibly massive, absolutely profound, and historically foundational Constituent Assembly of India officially and aggressively adopted the Constitution of India. Ambedkar, this incredibly massive document formally established the absolute, sovereign, socialist, secular, and democratic architecture of the Indian Republic.
